raw: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with a $5 discount per person—children under the age of 18 are always admitted free. Timed ticket reservations must be made in advance of visit with library e-voucher on the museum's website. Directions and information regarding e-voucher use will be provided in your confirmation email. For more information about the museum, please visit https://www.gardnermuseum.org/visit. MUSEUM HOURS: WEEKDAYS 11 AM – 5 PM | WEEKENDS 10 AM – 5 PM | THURSDAYS 11 AM – 9 PM | CLOSED TUESDAYS Please note that reserving a library pass does not guarantee that space will be available on your preferred date.

source_phrases.free_under_age: children under the age of 18 are always admitted free
source_phrases.max_adults: four (4) people with a $5 discount per person
